name: cf-ai-card
description: 创非凡数智名片 monorepo bootstrap

scripts.e2e:runtime: corepack pnpm local:start && corepack pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.runtime.config.ts
scripts.e2e:install: corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium
scripts.webvitals:test: corepack pnpm exec playwright test --config playwright.performance.config.ts
scripts.api:dev: node tools/run-python.mjs api -m uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir services/api --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.api:lint: node tools/run-python.mjs api -m ruff check services/api tools/sync_openapi_contract.py tools/release
scripts.api:test: node tools/run-python.mjs api -m pytest services/api/tests -m "not integration"
scripts.eval:live:tuotu: node tools/run-python.mjs api -m app.cli.evaluate_rag packages/evals/tuotu.v2.json --output artifacts/evals/tuotu-v2.json
scripts.worker:dev: node tools/run-python.mjs worker -m celery -A cf_worker.celery_app:celery_app worker --pool=solo --queues=outbox.poll,outbox.process --loglevel=INFO
scripts.worker:beat: node tools/run-python.mjs worker -m celery -A cf_worker.celery_app:celery_app beat --loglevel=INFO
scripts.worker:test: node tools/run-python.mjs worker -m ruff check services/worker && node tools/run-python.mjs worker -m pytest services/worker/tests -m "not integration"
scripts.perf:test: node tools/run-python.mjs api -m ruff check --config services/api/pyproject.toml tools/perf && node tools/run-python.mjs api -m pytest tools/perf/tests
scripts.check: corepack pnpm contracts:check && corepack pnpm contracts:validate && corepack pnpm api:lint && corepack pnpm api:test && corepack pnpm eval:validate && corepack pnpm worker:test && corepack pnpm perf:test && corepack pnpm perf:smoke && corepack pnpm release:test && corepack pnpm web:test && corepack pnpm web:build && corepack pnpm admin:test && corepack pnpm admin:build
